hero.subtitle: We're getting married
hero.quote:
"I am my beloved's,
and my beloved is mine."

— Song of Solomon 6:3
hero.infoText: Join us as we celebrate our love and begin our journey together. We would be honored to have you with us on this special day.

ceremony.title: Ceremony
ceremony.description: A beautiful church surrounded by nature in Stuttgart, providing a warm and intimate setting for the wedding ceremony.

reception.title: Reception
reception.description: An elegant event palace with luxurious décor and a grand ballroom — the perfect place to celebrate the evening together.

quote.line3: A cord of three strands is not quickly broken.
quote.text:
Though one may be overpowered,
two can defend themselves.
A cord of three strands is not quickly broken.

— Ecclesiastes 4:12

rsvp.subtitle: Join Us
rsvp.title: RSVP
rsvp.quote: We would be honored to celebrate this special day with you.

ceremony.description: The moment we officially begin our journey together.
ceremony.message: We cannot wait to see you as we say yes.

photos.description: Congratulations, embraces and photographs after the ceremony.
photos.message: A first collection of memories with the people we love.

arrival.description: Join us for drinks, conversations and a warm welcome.
arrival.message: The evening begins the moment you arrive.

dinner.description: A shared meal, stories and celebration with family and friends.
dinner.message: Good food tastes even better when shared with you.

party.description: Music, dancing and the beginning of an unforgettable night.
party.message: Meet us on the dance floor.

intro.title: Arrive. Exhale. Stay.
intro.description: For guests travelling from further away, we have selected a few nearby hotels where you can feel at home before and after our celebration.

mapView.title: Your journey through our day.
mapView.description: Ceremony, celebration and our hotel recommendations at a glance. The gold line connects the two places of our wedding day.
mapView.mapLabel: Interactive map showing the ceremony, celebration and recommended hotels

car.title: By Car
car.details: The ceremony location in Rohr can be reached via the A8 motorway. Follow signs towards Stuttgart-Vaihingen. Parking is available near the church.

train.title: By Train
train.details: Take the S-Bahn to Rohr station. From there the church is only a short taxi ride or bus ride away.

parking.title: Parking
parking.details: Parking is available near the church. Please follow local parking signs around the parish area.

car.title: By Car
car.details: White Event Palast in Kirchheim unter Teck can be reached via the A8 motorway. Take the Kirchheim/Teck exit and follow signs toward the industrial area.

train.title: By Train
train.details: From Stuttgart Hauptbahnhof take the regional train toward Kirchheim unter Teck. From the station the venue is a short taxi ride.

parking.title: Parking
parking.details: Large parking areas are available directly at the White Event Palast venue.

dressCode.question: What is the dress code?
dressCode.answer: The dress code is elegant. Please avoid orange, white and emerald green, as these colors are reserved for the bridal team.

arrival.question: When should guests arrive?
arrival.answer: Please arrive around 30 minutes before the church ceremony so everyone can be seated before 12:30.

plusOne.question: Can I bring a plus one?
plusOne.answer: Your invitation indicates whether a plus one is included. Please contact us if anything is unclear.

children.question: Are children welcome?
children.answer: Your invitation includes everyone we have planned for. Please contact us before adding children to your RSVP. Children under 6 years old are welcome and do not need to be registered separately, as they can usually sit with their parents. Children aged 6 and above, however, must be included in the RSVP, as we need to reserve a separate seat for them.

dietary.question: What should I do if I have dietary restrictions?
dietary.answer: Please include allergies or dietary requirements in your RSVP so the kitchen can prepare for you.

late.question: What happens if I arrive late?
late.answer: Please enter quietly and follow the venue team's guidance. A short message to your contact person is helpful.

parking.question: Where can I park?
parking.answer: Parking is available near the church, and larger parking areas are located directly at White Event Palast.

publicTransport.question: Is public transportation available?
publicTransport.answer: Yes. Rohr and Kirchheim unter Teck stations are the nearest main connections; use a bus or taxi for the final part.

charging.question: Are there charging stations nearby?
charging.answer: Public charging stations are available in the surrounding area. Please check current availability before travelling.

accessible.question: Is the venue wheelchair accessible?
accessible.answer: Please contact us in advance so we can confirm the most suitable entrance, parking space and route for you.

nearbyHotels.question: Which hotels are nearby?
nearbyHotels.answer: The accommodation chapter presents our personally selected recommendations near the celebration, including distance and travel time.

recommendedHotels.question: Are there recommended hotels?
recommendedHotels.answer: Yes. We selected several suitable hotels and added direct website, booking and map links.

hotelDistance.question: How far are the hotels from the venue?
hotelDistance.answer: Distances to the ceremony and celebration, along with an estimated travel time, are shown for every recommendation.

hotelTravel.question: Are there transportation options between hotel and venue?
hotelTravel.answer: Taxis and shared rides are the easiest options. A dedicated shuttle is not currently confirmed.

photographer.question: Will there be a photographer?
photographer.answer: Yes, a professional photographer will capture the day. Please give them space during the key moments.

guestPhotos.question: Can guests take photos?
guestPhotos.answer: Absolutely, except during any moment announced as unplugged. We would love to see the celebration through your eyes.

dancing.question: Will there be music and dancing?
dancing.answer: Yes. After dinner, the evening opens into music, dancing and celebration.

endTime.question: Until what time will the celebration continue?
endTime.answer: The party is planned to continue late into the night. Final timing follows the venue and the flow of the celebration.

contact.question: Who should I contact if I have questions?
contact.answer: Please use the contact details shared with your invitation or get in touch with the couple directly.

weather.question: What happens in case of bad weather?
weather.answer: The celebration will continue. Indoor and covered spaces are available, and any necessary changes will be communicated.

footer.message: Thank you for celebrating with us.
footer.thankYouTitle: Thank you for celebrating with us.
footer.thankYouBody:
Your love, prayers, and presence made this day truly unforgettable.
We are grateful to begin this new chapter surrounded by the people we love most.
footer.verseLine2: and where you stay, I will stay."
footer.imageAlt: Caleb and Rachel smiling together in a warm wedding portrait

rsvpSuccess.title: Thank You
rsvpSuccess.message2: Our invitation team is currently reviewing all responses as we carefully organize the celebration
rsvpSuccess.message3: We truly appreciate your patience and your kindness in celebrating this special moment with us.
rsvpSuccess.contactText: If you have any questions, feel free to contact us
